debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
⊢ range (HTPI.Exercises.val_image U A) = 𝒫 A

proof:
by
  apply funext; intro B; apply propext
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨X, hX⟩ := h
    rw [← hX]
    intro y hy
    obtain ⟨x, hxX, rfl⟩ := hy
    exact x.property
  · intro h
    exists (λ x : A => B x.val)
    apply funext; intro y; apply propext
    apply Iff.intro
    · intro hy
      obtain ⟨x, hxX, rfl⟩ := hy
      exact hxX
    · intro hy
      exists ⟨y, h hy⟩
successful_attempts:

  · intro h

    apply funext; intro y; apply propext
